verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Somebody lift our hands As we celebrate the greatness of our god He is great and he is greatly to be praised This is the worship song that says this, "our God is awesome"

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He can move mountains (He can move mountains) keep me in the valley (Keep me in the valley) hide me from the rain (Hide me from the rain)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come on, our God is awesome He heals me when I'm broken (Heals me when I'm broken) Gives strength where I've been weakened (strength where I've been weakened) Forever He will reign (forever He will reign)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come on, say "my God is awesome" He can move mountains (He can move mountains) keep me in the valley (Keep me in the valley) hide me from the rain (Hide me from the rain)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My God is awesome He heals me when I'm broken (Heals me when I'm broken) Strength where I've been weakened (strength where I've been weakened) Forever He will reign (forever He will reign)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Come on, if you believe it, lift your voice and say Come on, if you know he's awesome, say it (Awesome) come on and lift your voice (Awesome) awesome (Awesome)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: My God (my God is awesome) come on and testify, awesome (Awesome) if you believe it, say it (Awesome) come on and say it (Awesome) My God

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Think about it, saviour of the whole world (Savior of the whole world) Giver of salvation (giver of salvation) By His stripes (by his stripes I am healed)

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: My God is awesome (my God is awesome) Today I am forgiven (today I am forgiven) His grace is why I'm living (His grace is why I'm living) Somebody oughta praise His holy name (praise His holy name)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Come on and testify, you know He's awesome, say it come on and lift your voice and say (Awesome) (Awesome) come on and say awesome (Awesome)

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: My God (my God is awesome) come on and say awesome (Awesome) come on, if you believe it, lift your voice (Awesome) (Awesome) come on, somebody say.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: He's mighty (He's mighty) He's mighty (He's mighty) He's mighty (He's mighty) He's mighty (He's mighty) Awesome (awesome)

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Come on and lift your voice and testify Come on and say He's holy (He's holy) He's holy (He's holy) He's holy (He's holy) He's holy (He's holy) Awesome (awesome) Come on and lift your voice and say (awesome)

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Come on and say, He's great (He's great) He's great (He's great) He's great (He's great) He's great (He's great). Awesome (awesome) hallelujah, come on and say (awesome)…

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: Come on and say, He's mighty (He's mighty) He's mighty (He's mighty) He's mighty (He's mighty) He's mighty (He's mighty) Awesome (awesome).

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: Everybody say awesome (Awesome) Come on and say, deliverer (deliverer) Deliverer (deliverer) Deliverer (deliverer) Deliverer (deliverer) come on and say (awesome) Come on and lift your voice if you believe and say (awesome)

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: Come on and say, He's holy (He's holy) He's holy (He's holy) He's holy (He's holy) He's holy (He's holy)…

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: Awesome (awesome) Come on, everybody oughta testify (awesome) Somebody lift your voice and say, provider (provider) Provider (provider) Provider (provider) Provider (provider) Awesome (awesome)…

verse.name: v19
verse.lines: Hallelujah, lift your voice (awesome) Somebody let Hell know, protector (protector) Protector (protector) Has He looked out for you? (protector) Protector (protector) awesome (awesome) Everybody say, awesome (awesome) let's get outta here.

verse.name: v20
verse.lines: My God (my God is awesome) He can move mountains (He can move mountains) keep you in the valley (Keep me in the valley) hide me from the rain (Hide me from the rain)

verse.name: v21
verse.lines: My God is awesome (my God is awesome) Heals me when I'm broken (heals me when I'm broken) Strength when I've been weakened (strength where I've been weakened) Praise His holy name (praise His holy name) Somebody oughta celebrate the awesome God Oh, oh, He's awesome
